title: Globalisation and identity
summary: 9699 — how global flows reshape national, ethnic, and personal identities.
learningObjectives: Evaluate postmodern and post-colonial views of identity.
Apply concepts to diaspora and transnational communities.

simpleExplanation.title: Global culture, local selves
simpleExplanation.summary: Global media and migration create both shared consumer cultures and new hybrid identities that blend local and global influences.
steps: Hybridity — mixing global and local cultures.

sections.content: **Globalisation and identity** (7.2) links to **1.3 social identity**. Use **Hall**, **Appadurai**, **Ritzer**.
